title: Villager Stats
body:
![The project's logo, spelling "Villager Stats"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee31e969af4f3fc8f902ea6bbf1b5025e577d111.png)

# Easily query information about villagers
With this data pack, it's easy to query information about
villagers, such as **job site**, **home location**,
**inventory contents**, and more.

![A screenshot showing the data pack's stats dialog, featuring information about the villager's profession, health, remaining restocks, and inventory contents. The interface also features buttons for locating the villager's job site, home, and meeting point.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b8dd3ffa2f62df906c3ff0c16c2bd619ffb2c73.webp)

## Feature list

- Locate the **job site**, **potential job site**, **bed** or **bell**
  of any villager
- Find out which villager has **claimed** a job site, potential job site, bed or bell
- Check the **health**, **inventory contents**, **remaining restocks** and more of any villager
- **Wand Item** with simple and intuitive controls
- In-game **tutorial**, **settings** and settings explanation

## How to use

1. Craft the wand with a stick and an emerald
2. Select a wand mode
    1. Sneak and right-click to cycle modes
    2. Sneak and hold right-click to directly select a mode
3. Right click on any villager, job site block, bed or bell while holding the wand

> For a quick overview, see the [**gallery**](https://modrinth.com/project/OYNW9zBT/gallery)

> For a detailed guide, see the [**wiki**](https://codeberg.org/helmo2019/minecraft-villager-stats/wiki)


## How to install
Download zip from **modrinth** or the [releases page](https://codeberg.org/helmo2019/minecraft-villager-stats/releases).

Drop both files into your world's `datapacks/` folder, or add them when creating a new world (`More` > `Data Packs`, drag and drop files into Minecraft
window, move data packs to the right panel).
